name: research_propose
description: Decompose a research question into subtasks, run parallel deep research (literature + internal knowledge), generate code-grounded individual proposals, then synthesize into a unified plan. Supports resumable checkpointing at every stage.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: The research task or hypothesis to investigate.

parameters.name: --workflow-target-path
parameters.description: Path to the codebase or file to research. Falls back to session's target_path if not provided.

parameters.name: --docs-path
parameters.description: Optional path to documentation directory (included in query and session context).

parameters.name: --research-only
parameters.description: Run breakdown + deep research only (skip individual proposals and unified plan).

parameters.name: --breakdown-only
parameters.description: Run only the task breakdown (decomposition), skip research and proposals.

parameters.name: --disable-unified-proposal
parameters.description: Skip the final unified proposal aggregation.

parameters.name: --max-breakdown
parameters.description: Guidance for how many subtasks to decompose into (e.g., '5 to 20'). Passed to the LLM as a range.

parameters.name: --max-researches
parameters.description: Hard limit on how many research workers to run. Defaults to all subtasks.

parameters.name: --research-inferencer
parameters.description: Inferencer type for the research phase (e.g., metamate_cli for literature/knowledge search). Defaults to --base-inferencer.

parameters.name: --proposal-inferencer
parameters.description: Inferencer type for the proposal phase (e.g., devmate_cli for code reading and actionable proposals). Defaults to --base-inferencer.

parameters.name: --base-inferencer
parameters.description: Inferencer type for breakdown, proposals, and aggregation (e.g., devmate_cli).

parameters.name: --resume
parameters.description: Resume from a previous workspace. Completed stages are skipped via checkpoints.

returns: Workspace path containing: breakdown analysis, research reports, individual proposals, and unified plan.
examples: research-propose --workflow-target-path /path/to/model.py "Analyze the model for improvement opportunities"
research-propose --workflow-target-path /path/to/model.py --docs-path /path/to/docs "Analyze the model and its documentation"
